description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the alpine:3.17 Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs only on the master branch, exports PATH to include ~/.cask/bin, installs openssh, make, git, curl, python3, emacs, bash via "apk update && apk add openssh make git curl python3 emacs openssh bash git", clones the Cask repository with "git clone https://github.com/cask/cask ~/.cask", runs "cask install", executes "make", and moves the generated html directory to public with "mv html public". Publish the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No services, caches, or extra variables are required.
